steps.title: Identify the sample and its source
steps.content:
• The survey sampled biology professors.
  • These professors were selected at random from the Texas public universities system.

steps.title: Determine the appropriate population for generalization
steps.content:
• Results from a random sample can be generalized to the population from which the sample was drawn.
  • Since the sample was biology professors from all Texas public university campuses, the largest population to which the results apply is all biology professors at all Texas public universities.
That is the correct answer.
